signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | NO** | **MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4%.[1] This is the latest reported figure as of search data through early March 2026, with no newer monthly releases (e.g., April) available and minor source variations (2.16% in one report).[3
